profile.name: Agilyx ASA
profile.headquarters: Tigard, Oregon, USA (parent listed in Oslo)
profile.about: Agilyx ASA is a technology company listed on Oslo Børs that enables customers to recycle difficult-to-recycle post-use plastics into high-value, virgin-equivalent products. Founded in 2004 as Plas2Fuel in Longview, Washington, the company renamed to Agilyx in 2010 and listed on Euronext Growth Oslo in 2020 before uplisting to the main Oslo Børs board in September 2022. Agilyx operates through two segments: Agilyx (conversion technology — pyrolysis-based depolymerization for polystyrene and mixed plastics) and Cyclyx (feedstock management using AI to aggregate and preprocess post-use plastics). In 2025 the company launched Plastyx Ltd., a 60:40 joint venture with Circular Resources SARL, targeting 200,000 MT of European plastic feedstock. CEO is Ranjeet Bhatia.

people.name: Ranjeet Bhatia
people.title: Chief Executive Officer
people.bio: CEO of Agilyx ASA. Previously Tim Stedman served as CEO (2020–2024).

keyFacts.label: JV
keyFacts.value: Plastyx Ltd. (2025) — European feedstock platform with Circular Resources
